title: drosanthemum decumbens
intro: Drosanthemum decumbens, also known as the creeping daisy or Antimima decumbens, is a small, succulent plant species native to South Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Drosanthemum decumbens include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and side effects.
